title: Set up React Hook Form with Zod validation
summary: Integrate React Hook Form v7 with Zod resolver in Next.js — useForm, Controller, shadcn/ui integration, server actions, and multi-step forms.
declaration: I will set up React Hook Form v7 with Zod validation for type-safe, performant forms. This avoids unnecessary re-renders and gives full TypeScript inference from your schema. If you prefer Formik or uncontrolled native forms, say so before I begin.
